creator: freebsd@darakrt.com
text:
Now that the mmap bug (http://www.freebsd.org/security/advisories/FreeBSD-EN-14:02.mmap.asc) that openjdk7 (7.45.18) could trigger has been fixed, (re)upgrading openjdk7 to the latest seems like a good idea.

Fix: 

Update the port to 7.45.18
How-To-Repeat: Install openjdk7.  Note the version number installed.
